# arifOS Constitutional MCP Kernel
> Version: 2026.4.13
> Endpoint: https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
> Transport: streamable-http
> Tools: 22
> Constitutional floors: F1–F13 (full coverage)
> Vault: VAULT999 — configured
> Vector memory: qdrant — configured
> Session cache: redis — configured
> Identity: https://arif-fazil.com/llms.txt
> Canon: https://apex.arif-fazil.com
> Source: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS
> Sealed: true
> Epoch: 2026-04-18

## Capabilities
Every call governed by 13 constitutional floors.
Irreversible actions require 888 HOLD human confirmation.
All SEAL verdicts written to VAULT999 Merkle chain.
Epistemic tags preserved across GEOX-WEALTH domain boundary.

## Tool Domains
GEOX: well_load_bundle, well_qc_logs, well_compute_petrophysics,
      section_interpret_strata, seismic_load_line, earth3d_load_volume,
      earth3d_interpret_horizons, earth3d_model_geometries,
      map_get_context_summary, time4d_verify_timing,
      prospect_evaluate, cross_summarize_evidence
WEALTH: npv_reward, irr_yield, pi_efficiency, emv_risk,
        score_kernel, monte_carlo_forecast
arifOS: judge_prospect, check_hold, compute_risk

## Constitutional Rules
F1 Amanah — reversible-first, irreversible needs 888 HOLD
F2 Truth — grounded claims, declare uncertainty band
F5 Peace — Peace² ≥ 1.0, no destructive escalation
F9 Anti-Hantu — no deception, no manipulation
F13 Sovereignty — human veto is final
